# Lars Persson

> Technical co-founder of Scita Health (precision prevention platform for women in perimenopause and menopause). Founder of FlexIT (advisory practice for compliant, AI-era enterprise IT). Founder and brewer at Green Frog Brewery (small-batch craft brewery in Trelleborg, Sweden). 25+ years in healthcare IT — post-merger integration, compliance architecture, sovereign health data infrastructure.

Lars Persson is a Copenhagen- and Trelleborg-based technical co-founder and compliance practitioner. He builds the infrastructure and frameworks (MDR, EUDI Wallet, GDPR, ISO) that keep regulated systems explainable, governable, and auditable. Since February 2022 he has also been an active volunteer driver with Blågula Bilen, delivering vehicles and supplies to Ukraine.

## About

- [Main bio](https://larspersson.com/): Profile, current ventures, Blågula Bilen volunteer work, track record, and contact.

## Current ventures

- [Scita Health](https://scita.health): Technical co-founder and founding architect (Jul 2024 – Present). AI-powered precision prevention platform for women navigating perimenopause and menopause. Composable stack — Xano, Pinecone, n8n, Claude API — wrapped in enterprise-scale compliance frameworks (MDR, EUDI Wallet, AI Sandbox).
- [FlexIT](https://flexit.tech): Founder. Advisory work for health and life sciences ventures facing post-merger tech integration, AI readiness in regulated environments, compliance architecture (GDPR, MDR, ISO), and interim technical leadership. Also publishes Field Notes on building with AI as a non-traditional developer.
- [Green Frog Brewery](https://greenfrog.beer): Founder and brewer, Trelleborg, Sweden. Small-batch craft brewery — 13 varieties hand-brewed in 23-liter batches on Grainfather equipment, including an unusual low- and non-alcoholic line.

## Where I Stand

- [Blågula Bilen](https://blagulabilen.se): Volunteer driver since February 2022. Swedish non-partisan, non-religious organisation founded by Take Aanstoot. Volunteers buy used 4×4s and trucks, fix them, fill them with equipment and medical supplies, and drive them to Ukraine. As of early 2026, more than 1,400 vehicles delivered.

## Track Record

25+ years in healthcare IT — post-merger integrations, compliance frameworks that survive audits, legacy modernisation. Companies include Occlutech (medical devices), Attendo (care delivery), and PE-backed healthcare rollups (integration leadership). Year ranges TBC.

## Contact

- Email: lars@flexit.tech
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/larsolovpersson-it-director/
- Locations: Copenhagen, Denmark · Trelleborg, Sweden

## Areas of expertise

Healthcare IT, post-merger technology integration, compliance architecture, GDPR, MDR medical device regulation, ISO standards, EUDI Wallet, European Health Data Space, sovereign health data infrastructure, AI in regulated environments, AI-era building as a non-traditional developer.
